name: document-skills
description: Word、Excel、PowerPoint 与 PDF 的内置文档处理能力集合

skills.name: docx
skills.shortDescription: 创建、读取、编辑、校验 Word .docx 文档
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $docx to create, read, edit, or validate a Word document.

skills.name: xlsx
skills.shortDescription: 创建、清洗、编辑、计算和校验 Excel/CSV 表格
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $xlsx to create, edit, analyze, or validate a spreadsheet.

skills.name: pptx
skills.shortDescription: 创建、读取、编辑和检查 PowerPoint 演示文稿
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $pptx to create, read, edit, or inspect a presentation deck.

skills.name: pdf
skills.shortDescription: 读取、合并、拆分、旋转、提取和填写 PDF 文件
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $pdf to read, edit, merge, split, convert, or fill a PDF.

skills.name: pdfkit-py
skills.shortDescription: 处理 PDF 编辑、OCR、表单、安全、转换和结构化分析
skills.defaultPrompt: Use $pdfkit-py for advanced PDF editing, OCR, form, conversion, or IR tasks.
